name: prohub-android
description: Standalone Android Capacitor shell for yProHub

scripts.web:patch-android-api: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$files = Get-ChildItem .\www -Recurse -File -Include *.js,*.html,*.json,*.css; foreach ($f in $files) { $txt = Get-Content $f.FullName -Raw; $txt = $txt -replace 'https://localhost:7042', 'http://10.0.2.2:5101'; $txt = $txt -replace 'http://localhost:7042', 'http://10.0.2.2:5101'; $txt = $txt -replace 'https://localhost:5001', 'http://10.0.2.2:5101'; $txt = $txt -replace 'http://localhost:5001', 'http://10.0.2.2:5101'; Set-Content -Path $f.FullName -Value $txt }"
scripts.web:sync: npm run web:build && npm run web:copy && npm run web:patch-android-api && npm run cap:sync
